title: Differentiation
summary: 9709 P2 differentiation — product, quotient, chain rules, stationary points, and optimisation with GeoGebra tangent explorer.
learningObjectives: Differentiate products and quotients of functions.
Use the chain rule for composite functions.

simpleExplanation.title: P2 extends the power rule
simpleExplanation.summary: P2 combines functions — product, quotient, and chain rules are essential. Second derivative distinguishes max from min.
steps: f″(x) > 0 at minimum; f″(x) < 0 at maximum.

sections.content: **P2 Differentiation** (2.4) follows **P1** (1.7) but adds **combined rules**. Show **working** for quotient rule — cancelling errors cost marks.
